must equal “03.” Starting with 2025, the LTPAC_DSPNSNG_FREQ_CD is used to identify long-term and 
post-acute care short-cycle (LTPAC) dispensing PDEs. Non-valid values may be present. 

This variable is different than the days supply of the medication on the PDE (the DAYS_SUPLY_NUM 
variable). 

A precursor of this variable was included from 2013–2024 (the SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD). This variable 
became the SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_1 in 2025 in the source data, when additional submission
